scripts.sync:www: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html manifest.json sw.js www/ && cp node_modules/@capacitor/core/dist/capacitor.js www/capacitor.js && cp -r css js icons www/ && echo v2.34 > www/VERSION.txt
scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:www && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:apk:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
